name: Complete NIXL LIBFABRIC Deployment - Fully Automated
description: 完全自動化されたデプロイメント: GitHub clone → ビルド → S3 → EC2セットアップ → vLLM起動。Phase 3 の成功パターンを完全再現。環境変数は外部から設定可能。

tasks.name: Check local prerequisites (git, ninja, meson, aws)
commands: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] git not found'; exit 1; }
command -v ninja >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] ninja not found. Install: pip install ninja'; exit 1; }
command -v meson >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] meson not found. Install: pip install meson'; exit 1; }
command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] aws CLI not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Clone or update NIXL from GitHub
commands: cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git fetch origin && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH} && git pull origin ${NIXL_BRANCH}
rm -rf "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git clone "${NIXL_REPO}" "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH}

tasks.name: Verify Request/Response protocol implementation
commands: grep -q 'loadRemoteConnInfo' "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.h" || { echo '[ERROR] loadRemoteConnInfo not found'; exit 1; }
grep -q 'remote_conn_info' "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.cpp" || { echo '[ERROR] remote_conn_info implementation not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Build NIXL LIBFABRIC plugin
commands: test -f "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/${BUILD_SUBDIR}/${PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}" || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin build failed'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Verify plugin artifact
commands: file "${PLUGIN_PATH}" | grep -q 'ELF.*shared object' || { echo '[ERROR] Not a valid ELF shared object'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Upload plugin to S3
commands: aws s3 ls "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}" --region ${AWS_REGION} || { echo '[ERROR] S3 upload verification failed'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Check SSH connectivity to both nodes
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" 'echo "[OK] Node1 connected"' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot connect to Node1'; exit 1; }
ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" 'echo "[OK] Node2 connected"' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot connect to Node2'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Setup Node1 (Producer) with vLLM + NIXL
commands: python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir 'vllm==0.17.0' --user -q || { echo '[ERROR] vLLM install failed'; exit 1; }
python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir 'nixl[cu12]' --user -q || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL install failed'; exit 1; }
aws s3 cp "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}" "${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so" --region ${AWS_REGION} --quiet || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin download failed'; exit 1; }

python3 -c 'import nixl; import os; plugin_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__), "_lib"); plugins = [f for f in os.listdir(plugin_dir) if f.startswith("libplugin_") and f.endswith(".so")]; print(f"[OK] Plugins: {plugins}"); assert "libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so" in plugins'

tasks.name: Setup Node2 (Consumer) with vLLM + NIXL
commands: python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir 'vllm==0.17.0' --user -q || { echo '[ERROR] vLLM install failed'; exit 1; }
python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir 'nixl[cu12]' --user -q || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL install failed'; exit 1; }
aws s3 cp "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}" "${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so" --region ${AWS_REGION} --quiet || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin download failed'; exit 1; }

python3 -c 'import nixl; import os; plugin_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__), "_lib"); plugins = [f for f in os.listdir(plugin_dir) if f.startswith("libplugin_") and f.endswith(".so")]; print(f"[OK] Plugins: {plugins}"); assert "libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so" in plugins'
